dimensions.label: Situation Questions
dimensions.description: Did the rep gather context about the prospect's current state and environment?

dimensions.label: Problem Questions
dimensions.description: Did the rep uncover specific problems, difficulties, or dissatisfactions?

dimensions.label: Implication Questions
dimensions.description: Did the rep explore the consequences and impact of those problems?

dimensions.label: Need-Payoff Questions
dimensions.description: Did the rep guide the prospect to articulate the value of solving the problem?

dimensions.label: Active Listening
dimensions.description: Did the rep listen deeply, acknowledge responses, and build on what was said?
